arts.ttl: Osasuna Consider Challenging Barcelona Win Due to Potential Ineligible Player
arts.sum: Barcelona could lose their match against Osasuna by default after it's been discovered that Inigo Martinez was ineligible to feature in the La Liga.

arts.ttl: Flick hails Gavi’s ‘great game’ after Barca beat Osasuna
arts.sum: Barcelona boss Hansi Flick was full of praise for midfielder Gavi after Thursday’s win over Osasuna in La Liga . The midfielder has struggled for starts in recent weeks but Flick made it clear just how highly he rates the 20-year-old.

arts.ttl: Barcelona scrapped Trent Alexander-Arnold move for two reasons after private talks
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold appears to be bound for Real Madrid but Barcelona held an interest in the Liverpool defender earlier this season and were in talks with his representatives

arts.ttl: ‘I’m angry’ - Kounde hits out at ‘lack of respect’ after Barca win
arts.sum: The timing of the match saw Barcelona leave Ronald Araujo and Raphinha out, and Kounde says it was disrespectful to the players. Barcelona defender Jules Kounde voiced his anger at the timing of the team’s clash with Osasuna on Thursday night .

arts.ttl: Eric Garcia and Gavi stand tall in dominant Barca win
arts.sum: That’s because the hosts’ performance was so dominant that the result against Osasuna - a team that had inflicted Hansi Flick’s first defeat as Barca coach - was never in doubt. Although neither were on the score sheet on the night, the performances of Gavi and Eric Garcia were particularly special.

arts.ttl: Flick shares Olmo update as Barca star looks set to miss crunch games
arts.sum: Barcelona boss Hansi Flick is expecting Dani Olmo to miss a couple of weeks after seeing the Spain star forced off in the first half against Osasuna . The forward was able to walk off the pitch - suggesting it’s not a serious injury - but Flick still expects him to miss the next few games.

arts.ttl: “Lack of respect” – Barcelona star Jules Kounde fumes after Osasuna victory
arts.sum: Barcelona may have won against Osasuna on Thursday, but it’s safe to say that not many at the club are overly happy after the match, with their frustrations being aimed at La Liga and the Spanish Football Federation. The match was originally scheduled for earlier this month, but it was postponed due to the sudden […] The post “Lack of respect” – Barcelona star Jules Kounde fumes after Osasuna victory appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Midfielder’s appearance against Osasuna costs Barcelona €1m
arts.sum: Barcelona won 3-0 against Osasuna on Thursday, but it turned out to be a costly victory in more ways than one for the Catalans. They lost Dani Olmo to a first half injury that will see him sidelined for at least a week, and in slightly less worrying news, they have been forced to pay […] The post Midfielder’s appearance against Osasuna costs Barcelona €1m appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: ‘It’s where I perform best’ - Ferran loving playing as striker for Barca
arts.sum: It’s a great return from the Shark and he says he’s happy to play up front for Barca this season. Ferran Torres says he’s playing his best football as a striker after scoring in Barcelona’s 3-0 win over Osasuna in La Liga .

arts.ttl: Barcelona beats Osasuna 3-0 to extend La Liga lead
arts.sum: Frenkie de Jong played Balde clear before the left back found Torres for the striker’s 14th goal of the season across all competitions despite playing most games as a second-half substitute for Lewandowski. Ferran Torres and Dani Olmo scored early goals to lead Barcelona to a 3-0 win over Osasuna and extend its lead of the Spanish league on Thursday.
